content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 29 focused on a major architectural migration to Vite SPA and Hono Workers, alongside significant infrastructure improvements for Cloudflare cutover preparation and refined model compatibility.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Architecture Migration & Infrastructure**
    *   Completed a major refactor migrating the project from Next.js to a Vite SPA with Hono Workers ([#484](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/484)).
    *   Prepared for Cloudflare cutover with shadow stack updates and workflow fixes ([#487](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/487)).
    *   Regenerated `bun.lock` to remove stale `kubernetes-fluent-client` dependencies ([#488](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/488)).

*   **API & Model Compatibility**
    *   Implemented a real Hono-on-Workers handler for image generation, migrating from `@vercel/blob` to R2 storage ([#489](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/489)).
    *   Normalized OpenRouter model IDs to ensure parity across pricing, usage analytics, and catalog lookups ([#486](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/486)).

*   **Documentation**
    *   Added a design specification for the Claude/Codex sub-agent to Milady runtime bridge ([#481](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/481)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#490](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/490): Fix develop CI and worker e2e.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Runtime & Error Handling**
    *   Resolved [#7203](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7203) by introducing a typed `NoModelProviderConfiguredError` to provide actionable feedback when no LLM provider is configured.
*   **Dependency & Import Cleanup**
    *   Resolved [#7202](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7202) regarding dangling imports following the deletion of re-export shims.
    *   Resolved [#7204](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7204) by decoupling the `@elizaos/agent` server from hard imports of `app-*` packages, moving routes into the plugin lifecycle.
*   **Telegram Integration**
    *   Resolved [#7009](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7009) by optimizing Telegram read receipts to fetch by message IDs, eliminating inefficient nested lookups.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
